summary: Issue #202 is open and current main does not implement a marker-backed `@clawsweeper visualize` command or PR review visual-hint lane. The request is still blocked on maintainer product judgment because the hydrated issue labels and prior ClawSweeper review identify this as a new durable command/comment contract after an earlier visual-assist lane was reverted; no fix artifact is safe to emit from this worker run.

actions.reason: Blocked on maintainer product decision for the durable `@clawsweeper visualize` contract: command shape, marker-backed comment behavior, relationship to the existing read-only assist lane, and scope after the prior visual-assist revert need explicit approval before automation opens an autogenerated implementation PR.

needs_human: Maintainer decision needed for https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/202: approve or narrow the durable `@clawsweeper visualize` command/comment contract before ClawSweeper opens or updates an autogenerated implementation PR.
